# GitHub Copilot Instructions

> **Primary Directive:** Read and follow all rules, conventions, and workflows defined in [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md). It is the single source of truth for this project.
> Git conventions (branches, commits, PRs, ID resolution) are in [`AGENTS.md` → Git Conventions](../AGENTS.md#git-conventions).
> Copilot review feedback workflow (reply + resolve each thread, then API-first re-request) is in [`AGENTS.md` → Copilot Review Conversations](../AGENTS.md#copilot-review-conversations).
